item.minearchive.kayoko.tooltip: She doesn't want you to go through too much trouble for enchantments (when consumed, equipment has a chance to gain 1~10 enchantments)
item.minearchive.kayoko.enchant_hint: She doesn't want you to go through too much trouble for potions (when consumed, has a chance to gain 1~2 buffs)
item.minearchive.kayoko.pity_mechanism: You cannot die under the protection of the most reliable person
item.minearchive.kayoko.holding_effect: When health is below 5%, a mysterious power will restore your health to full
